features: Easy Decoration: Add to the holiday cheer with our 27 cm mistletoe Christmas decor. With a variety of designs to choose from, create an effortless atmosphere setting and easily spruce up any space

Upgrades Holiday Ambiance: Transform your space this holiday season with our mistletoe Christmas decor. The vivid greenery and snowy mistletoe with shiny leaves lift your home to a haven of Christmas beauty. Infuse festive feelings in any room with this cheerful Christmas decoration

Muti-Purpose Use: Upgrade the ambiance of your holiday romance with mistletoe christmas decor's versatile application. From a charming tree garland to a quaint door decor, this unique customization enhances the festive spirit perfectly

Effortless Installation: Elevate your holiday décor with our realistic and stunning mistletoe. Made from high-quality materials, its sturdy yet sturdy design and easy cleaning make it the perfect addition to your Christmas space

Prosperity Symbol: Drawing the symbolism of mistletoe as a prosperity symbol, this Christmas decor radiates the mystery and sacredness of the holiday season, elevating your home with an intensified festive ambiance and greater potential for holiday blessings
description: Add a touch of tradition to your holiday decor with our Christmas Mistletoe Decor. This vibrant greenery will not only brighten up your door, but it also symbolizes prosperity. Measuring 27 cm in length, it's the perfect size to add a festive element to your home. And the best part? It's easy to clean, making it a effortless addition to your holiday decor. Specifications: Name: Mistletoe Christmas Decor Material: ABS, metal wire, gold powder, wood Product size: about 27cm/10.63 inches (long) Packing List: 1 x Mistletoe Christmas Decor Notes: 1.
